─[ ESLint 10 Crash on Node 18 ]─ ┐

name: eslint-10-node-18-crash description: ESLint 10 crashes on Node 18 with util.styleText is not a function — pin to ESLint 9 or restrict lint to Node 20+ user-invocable: false allowed-tools: Read, Bash

ESLint 10 Crash on Node 18

ESLint 10’s built-in stylish formatter uses util.styleText(), which was added in Node 20.12. On Node 18, ESLint 10 crashes before reporting any lint results.

Symptom

CI fails on Node 18 matrix jobs only:

TypeError: util.styleText is not a function
    at ... eslint/lib/cli-engine/formatters/stylish.js

Node 20+ jobs pass. No lint results are produced — the crash happens at formatter init.

Fix

Option A — Pin ESLint to v9 (last version supporting Node 18):

{
  "devDependencies": {
    "eslint": "^9.0.0"
  }
}

Option B — Skip lint on Node 18 in CI:

- name: Lint
  if: matrix.node-version >= 20
  run: npx eslint .

Detection

  • Fails on Node 18 matrix jobs, passes on Node 20+
  • Stack trace points to eslint/lib/cli-engine/formatters/stylish.js
  • Error is TypeError: util.styleText is not a function
  • No lint output is produced — crash precedes any file analysis
PgUp/PgDn: scroll b: bulk commands q: quit x: menu ← → ↑ ↓: navigate
Donate 0.24.4
